title: thlaspi perfoliatum var. rotundatum
intro: Thlaspi perfoliatum var. rotundatum, also known as round-leaved pepperwort or round-leaved thlaspi, is a perennial plant in the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Thlaspi perfoliatum var. rotundatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
